headline: Why Is Green Dot (GDOT) Up 1.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Green Dot (GDOT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: ABM Stock Price Increases 11% Since Reporting Q2 Earnings Miss
summary: ABM Industries shares jump 10.9% after reporting Q2 EPS miss. But revenues beat on record bookings, led by Technical Solutions and Aviation.
